questions.text: Do they think they're the funniest person in the group?
Would they describe themselves as "low maintenance"... incorrectly?
Do they secretly believe they could have gone pro in something?
Would they make everyone retake the group photo?
Do they think they're a great driver?
Have they definitely googled themselves?
Would they return a found wallet with all the cash still in it?
Would they lie their way out of a parking ticket?
Would they rat out a friend to save themselves?
Would they cut in line if they were sure nobody would notice?
Would they tell you about the spinach in your teeth, every time?
Would they sneak snacks into the movies with zero guilt?
Would they say yes to a road trip leaving in an hour?
Have they ever been injured doing something they were explicitly warned about?
Would they start the dance floor while it's still empty?
Would they eat it off the floor well past five seconds?
Would they jump in the lake fully clothed on a dare?
Is their phone battery below 20% right now?
Do they leave parties without saying goodbye?
Are they secretly thrilled when plans get cancelled?
Do they get energy from being the center of attention?
Would they chat with a stranger on a plane by choice?
Do they need a full recovery day after a big party?
Are they usually the last one to leave the party?
Do they hit snooze more than twice?
Do they have thousands of unread emails?
Would they rewatch the same show instead of starting a new one?
Do they make their bed every single morning?
Are they chronically fifteen minutes late?
Do they reply to texts within five minutes?
Would they cry at a stranger's wedding?
Would they get back together with an ex?
Do they fall in love embarrassingly fast?
Would they make the first move?
Do they believe in soulmates?
Would they date someone all their friends disliked?
Would they Venmo request you for less than five dollars?
Would they splurge on fancy groceries but refuse to pay for parking?
Would they haggle at a garage sale?
Do they know their bank balance to the dollar right now?
Would they grab the whole tab just for the moment?
Would they buy a lottery ticket "just in case"?
Would they survive the first act of a horror movie?
If aliens landed, would they volunteer to go aboard?
Would you want them on your team in a zombie apocalypse?
Would they become insufferable if they got famous?
Would they use a time machine to bet on sports instead of fixing history?
Could they be talked into joining a cult, at least for a weekend?
